# AskMukthiGuru

> AI-guided spiritual conversations rooted in the teachings of Sri Preethaji & Sri Krishnaji. Free, private, and always available — designed to help you transition from a stressful state into a Beautiful State.

AskMukthiGuru is a privacy-first chat companion and meditation guide. It pairs a conversational guru persona with short guided practices (Soul Sync, Serene Mind, Beautiful State, Daily Reflection) and a daily teaching feed. Conversations are stored per-user; anonymous use falls back to local storage.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview, meet the gurus, how it works, and featured practices.
- [Chat](/chat): Conversational AI guru rooted in Preethaji & Krishnaji's teachings.
- [Practices](/practices): Catalog of guided meditations and reflections.
- [Sign in](/auth): Email, password, and Google sign-in.
- [Privacy](/privacy): How conversations and meditation data are handled.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of use, including AI disclosure.

## Practices

- [Soul Sync](/practices/soul-sync): 15–20 min contemplative practice for inner connection.
- [Serene Mind](/practices/serene-mind): 3-minute 4-in/6-out breathing reset with flame visualization.
- [Beautiful State](/practices/beautiful-state): 10–15 min heart-opening loving-kindness practice.
- [Daily Reflection](/practices/daily-reflection): 5–10 min evening review with gratitude.
